# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 0.9.x   | ✅ Active  |
| < 0.9   | ❌ End of life |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do not file a public GitHub issue for security bugs.**

Report privately via GitHub Security Advisories:
https://github.com/Rahspide/sffmc/security/advisories/new

You should receive a response within 72 hours. We follow a 90-day disclosure timeline coordinated with the reporter.
